author: Dr. Helena Vargas / Dr. Owen Pratt (Surgery PGY-3)
content:
ACUTE CARE SURGERY — DAILY PROGRESS NOTE
POD#2 s/p open cholecystectomy.

SUBJECTIVE: Feeling better. Pain improving, using minimal opioids. Tolerating a regular diet without nausea. Ambulating in halls with nursing.

OBJECTIVE:
- Afebrile, hemodynamically stable.
- Telemetry: NO atrial fibrillation or other arrhythmia in the past 24 hours (sinus throughout).
- Abdomen: incision intact, improving tenderness; drain output minimal — removed today.
- Labs: WBC continuing to downtrend.

ASSESSMENT/PLAN:
#Perforated cholecystitis s/p open chole — improving steadily. Continue antibiotics; diet advanced; drain removed.
#Atrial fibrillation — no events today; Medicine continuing to follow.
#VTE prophylaxis continued.
Discharge anticipated ~POD#5.
attestation: Electronically signed by Dr. Owen Pratt, MD (PGY-3) and Dr. Helena Vargas, MD. 6/12/2027.
